section2/accounts/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the java.version property for cross-compilation support.

section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for Getter, Setter, and ToString.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.before: super(String.format("%s not found withe the given input data %s: '%s'", resourceName, fieldName, fieldValue));
section2/accounts/src/main/java/com/eazy.after: super("%s not found withe the given input data %s: '%s'".formatted(resourceName, fieldName, fieldValue));
